productDisplayName: Lakme Absolute Mattreal Ivory Fair Skin Natural Mousse 01
description: Science meets beauty is lakme Absolute. A range of high performance long wear make up products from Lakme, this can last up to 16 hours. Lakme Absolute Mattreal Skin Natural Mousse gives you breathable natural skin while also giving you a flawless look that hides pores, fine lines and uneven skin tone.
